title: pimpinella leschenaultii
intro: Pimpinella leschenaultii, also known as the Indian anise or Indian celery, is a plant species belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pimpinella leschenaultii include its ability to aid digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and lower blood pressure. Pimpinella leschenaultii is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
